name: J D Wetherspoon PLC
description: UK's largest managed pub chain operating ~794 value-oriented pubs across the UK and Ireland. Known for food, drinks and accommodation at competitive prices. FY ends late July.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue £2,128m in FY2025 (+4.5% YoY). Like-for-like sales growth +3.2% in early FY2026. ~794 pubs trading, plan to open ~15 new pubs pa plus franchises. Bar revenue 57%, food 38%.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Operating profit before exceptionals £146m in FY2025 (6.9% margin, up from 6.9% in FY2024). EBITDA ~£203m. NIC and labour cost increases of ~£60m pa headwind. Energy levies rising £7m pa.
assumptions.risks: High net debt £724m (excl IFRS-16 leases; £1,129m including). Government-led cost increases (NIC, energy levies, EPR tax). Consumer spending pressure. Total debt/EBITDA ~3.6x. Significant capex requirements (£117m pa).
assumptions.catalyst: Share buybacks reducing share count (10.6m shares bought in FY2025 at avg 631p). Progressive dividend (12p in FY2025). Pub openings and franchise expansion. Strong like-for-like sales outperformance vs industry.
